questions.question: In a feature-based Vue project structure, where should code that is used by two or more features live?
options: In the first feature that needed it, imported by others
In a shared/ folder separate from all feature folders
Duplicated in each feature to maintain independence
In the root src/ folder alongside the router and App.vue

questions.question: What is the purpose of an index.ts barrel export in a feature folder?
options: It registers all feature components globally with app.component()
It defines the feature's public API: what other features are allowed to import
It lazy-loads all feature routes for code splitting
It merges the feature's Pinia store with the global store

questions.question: What naming convention does the style guide recommend for Vue components?
options: kebab-case to match HTML element conventions
camelCase to match JavaScript variable naming
PascalCase to distinguish them from native HTML elements in templates
SCREAMING_CASE to identify them as constants
